title: Painting Selector
description: Allows for specific painting selection via the Stonecutter.
body:
Place a painting in the Stonecutter and choose from all of vanilla Minecraft's paintings!
I recommend using the resource pack too, as it will visualise the paintings, but it's not required.![A showcase of the Stonecutter GUI when loaded with a painting.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee8b67684f30acd08745bb9473764798e5b6c5.png)
